answer: Google's headquarters is located in Mountain View, California, at 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway. The facility is known as the Googleplex. This is the main office for the company.

results.title: Google Headquarters and Office Locations | Global Business Footprint
results.snippet: # google Headquarters & Office Locations. # Google Headquarters and Office Locations. The company has a significant presence across the United States, with major offices in cities like New York, Chicago, Austin, Boulder, and Atlanta, and around the world, from London and Paris to Tokyo, Johannesburg, and Accra. Located on West 2nd Street, the Austin office is a key hub in the company's expansion into the southern United States. Opened in 2001 as Google's first international office, the Tokyo headquarters established the company’s footprint in the Asia-Pacific region, serving as a gateway to innovation in this important tech market. Google’s second international office, Hamburg anchors the company’s operations in Germany, catering to local digital markets and regulatory engagement. This office is notable for its inclusion of local art installations and active community engagement, reflecting Google's dedication to supporting tech development in Africa. Whether you're researching Google's global footprint or exploring office locations for other organizations, Websets provides detailed insights into headquarters addresses, office types, and geographic presence.

results.title: Where is Google's Headquarters? Main Office Location and Global ...
results.snippet: Main Office Location and Global Offices. This article will delve into the company's main headquarters and explore its most significant office locations that support its worldwide operations. Google's main headquarters is located at 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway in Mountain View, California, 94043. This address places the company's primary office in the center of Silicon Valley, a region recognized globally as a hub for technology and innovation. It functions as the nerve center for Google's worldwide business, coordinating the activities that take place across its numerous international offices and data centers. ## Other Google Office Locations. Here's a list of Google's other office locations:. For more detailed information on Google's operations or to find data on other companies, Clay is an invaluable resource. Exploring company structures like Google's is just the beginning of what our platform can do. ## Get access to more people and company data using Clay.

results.title: All About Googleplex, Google's Main HQ: Size, Cost; Other Offices
results.snippet: The Googleplex, the global headquarters for Google and its parent company Alphabet, is located in Mountain View, California.

results.title: Googleplex - 43, 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA ...
results.snippet: Googleplex, located in Mountain View, California, serves as the corporate headquarters for Google. This expansive campus is known for its innovative work
